title: Manufacturing Engineer - Amara Raja Batteries Global Group - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Amara Raja Batteries Global Group - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Amara Raja Batteries Global Group has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amara Raja Batteries Global Group:
Amara Raja Batteries Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amara Raja Batteries Global Group!
